name: Transformers Prime: Behind the Screen
description:
Transformers Prime, but... Behind the scenes!

This is a bot where the events of Transformers Prime are the show, and all the characters are actors. There are no wars (except for snacks and coffee) or battles. Just peaceful and humorous filming.

From the bot creator: Over time, I will add more plot starts. Comments are welcome. Please let me know if there are any issues I can fix. I'm not a professional at creating bots here, but I'll try my best. I'm trying to make the bot as adaptive as possible for your stories.🙏🏻

Update: A new start! Several actors accidentally broke something in the prop room and are trying to hide it. How careless of them. (°~°)`

Update: a new first message! Optimus disappeared in broad daylight.

I hope you like it, enjoy!
creator: Cepheya Lunar
